label: The Rivet Oathwright
description: The Rivet Oathwright is a licensed metalwork shop set into Varric Holdfast’s salvaged ashlar, its soot-stained brick chimney rising above a steep lane of patched masonry. A heavy bench dominates the interior beneath hanging chains and stamped gauge-plates, with racks for rivets, clasps, and lock components organized by civic measure. Hazard placards and interdiction tags are fixed beside the quench trough, reflecting the city’s codified controls over suspect salvage and breach-site metals. A narrow back alcove holds a sealed ledger niche and wax-stamp tray used for recording commissions under magistrate oversight.
